name: Vendor Security Review Completed
description: High and critical risk vendors should have completed security reviews with SOC2, ISO27001, or equivalent documentation on file
remediation: Complete a security review of the vendor including review of their SOC2 report, security questionnaire, or conduct a security assessment
remediation_steps: Request SOC2 Type II report or equivalent from vendor
Review the report for any exceptions or concerns
Send security questionnaire for areas not covered
Document findings and any accepted risks
Set reminder for annual review renewal
